recent_excerpts: Palo Alto Unit 42 outlines defensive strategies for frontier AI threats — model poisoning, prompt injection, and data leakage — in response to top customer queries.
Unit 42 details wormable npm malware, CI/CD pipeline persistence, and multi-stage attacks targeting developers.
Palo Alto Unit 42 reports TGR-STA-1030 remains active in Central and South America, targeting government and energy sectors with custom malware and living-off-the-land techniques.
